description: Inline AI macros: type !!prompt! and have it expand in place via an OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Implicit Macros

name: Implicit Macros

releases.author: Isolyth
releases.description:
Fixes for the community-plugin review:

- Bump `minAppVersion` to 1.8.7 to match `loadLocalStorage`/`saveLocalStorage` usage
- Replace `setInterval` with self-rescheduling `setTimeout` for the dot animation
- Type `JSON.parse` results in `api.ts` to silence unsafe-any warnings
- Annotate `loadLocalStorage` return as `unknown` in `crypto.ts`
- Drop `builtin-modules` package in favor of `node:module`'s `builtinModules`

releases.author: Isolyth
releases.description:
## Changes

- Address Obsidian community-plugin reviewbot feedback:
  - Remove `SyntaxNode | null` annotation that triggered `no-redundant-type-constituents` (the `@lezer/common` `SyntaxNode` carries an error-typed constituent).
  - Replace fire-and-forget `Promise.resolve().then(...)` with `queueMicrotask(...)`.
  - Sentence-case fixes in Notice and setting descriptions.

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` and drop them into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/implicit-macros/`, or install via Obsidian's Community Plugins browser once accepted.

releases.author: Isolyth
releases.description:
Initial public release of Implicit Macros.

Type `!!prompt!` in a note and the closing `!` fires a streamed call to an OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint, replacing the macro source with the model's response.

## Highlights
- Inline macro syntax with configurable open/close delimiters (defaults: `!!` / `!`).
- Token-by-token streaming via SSE; freshly inserted text fades from the accent color over 1.5s.
- Per-character braille spinner overlay sized to match the original macro's pixel width.
- API key encrypted at rest in `data.json` with a per-device AES-256-GCM key.
- Configurable system prompt, model, base URL, and preceding-context budget.

## Install
Build assets are attached: `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`. Drop them into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/implicit-macros/` and enable under Settings -> Community plugins.

## Data flow
The plugin sends the macro prompt plus up to `Context chars` (default 1500) of preceding note text to the OpenAI-compatible endpoint you configure in settings. No telemetry, no third-party calls beyond the configured endpoint.
